title: OpenMetadata Shared Service
description: Parameters for deploying OpenMetadata as a shared service.

tre_id.title: TRE ID
tre_id.description: The ID of the parent TRE instance e.g., mytre-dev-3142.

id.title: OpenMetadata Instance ID
id.description: Unique ID for this OpenMetadata service instance.

tfstate_resource_group_name.title: Terraform State Resource Group Name
tfstate_resource_group_name.description: Resource group containing the Terraform state storage account for this bundle.

tfstate_storage_account_name.title: Terraform State Storage Account Name
tfstate_storage_account_name.description: The name of the Terraform state storage account for this bundle.

tfstate_container_name.title: Terraform State Container Name
tfstate_container_name.description: The name of the Terraform state storage container for this bundle.

arm_use_msi.title: Use MSI for ARM Authentication
arm_use_msi.description: Set to true to use Managed Service Identity for Azure authentication.

openmetadata_kubernetes_namespace.title: Kubernetes Namespace
openmetadata_kubernetes_namespace.description: Kubernetes namespace to deploy OpenMetadata into.

openmetadata_helm_chart_url.title: OpenMetadata Helm Chart URL
openmetadata_helm_chart_url.description: URL of the OpenMetadata Helm chart repository.

openmetadata_helm_chart_name.title: OpenMetadata Helm Chart Name
openmetadata_helm_chart_name.description: Name of the OpenMetadata Helm chart in the repository.

openmetadata_helm_chart_version.title: OpenMetadata Helm Chart Version
openmetadata_helm_chart_version.description: Version of the OpenMetadata Helm chart to deploy. Please check https://github.com/open-metadata/openmetadata-helm-charts/releases for the latest version.

openmetadata_create_namespace.title: Create Kubernetes Namespace
openmetadata_create_namespace.description: Set to true to let Helm create the namespace if it doesn't exist.

database_host.title: Database Host
database_host.description: Hostname of the external database server (PostgreSQL or MySQL).

database_port.title: Database Port
database_port.description: Port of the external database server.

database_name.title: Database Name
database_name.description: Name of the database for OpenMetadata.

database_extra_args.title: Database Extra JDBC Arguments
database_extra_args.description: Extra arguments for the database JDBC connection string (e.g., sslmode=require for PostgreSQL, or useSSL=false for MySQL if not using SSL).

database_driver_class.title: Database JDBC Driver Class
database_driver_class.description: JDBC Driver class for the database (e.g., org.postgresql.Driver or com.mysql.cj.jdbc.Driver).

database_type.title: Database Type
database_type.description: Type of database ('postgres' or 'mysql'). This determines the dbScheme for OpenMetadata.

elasticsearch_scheme.title: Elasticsearch Scheme
elasticsearch_scheme.description: Scheme for Elasticsearch connection (http or https).

elasticsearch_user.title: Elasticsearch User
elasticsearch_user.description: Username for Elasticsearch (if security is enabled).

elasticsearch_password.title: Elasticsearch Password
elasticsearch_password.description: Password for Elasticsearch (if security is enabled).

airflow_enabled.title: Enable Airflow
airflow_enabled.description: Set to true to deploy Airflow along with OpenMetadata for ingestion workflows.
